evals.expected_output: Validates inputs, renames on GitHub via gh api PATCH, updates git remote, renames local directory, uninstalls old symlinks, updates references in project and sibling repos, reinstalls symlinks, verifies, prints summary

assertions.name: validates_name_format
assertions.check: Validates both names match ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$

assertions.name: parses_remote
assertions.check: Extracts host, org, repo from git remote get-url origin

assertions.name: checks_admin_permission
assertions.check: Verifies GitHub App has administration:write before renaming

assertions.name: renames_on_github
assertions.check: Calls gh api -X PATCH /repos/{org}/{old-name} -f name={new-name}

assertions.name: updates_remote_url
assertions.check: Runs git remote set-url origin with new repo name

assertions.name: renames_local_dir
assertions.check: Runs mv and cd to new directory path

assertions.name: uninstalls_before_modify
assertions.check: Runs install.sh --uninstall BEFORE modifying any files

assertions.name: uses_custom_lookarounds
assertions.check: Uses (?<![A-Za-z0-9._-]) boundaries, not \b

assertions.name: skips_workflows
assertions.check: Does NOT auto-modify .github/workflows/ files

assertions.name: commits_sibling_specific_files
assertions.check: Uses git add <files> && git commit, not git commit -am

assertions.name: runs_install
assertions.check: Runs install.sh after modifications to recreate symlinks

assertions.name: verifies_result
assertions.check: Runs git ls-remote origin and checks for stale symlinks

evals.expected_output: Shows all changes that would be made without executing any of them

assertions.name: no_github_rename
assertions.check: Does NOT call gh api -X PATCH

assertions.name: no_file_modifications
assertions.check: Does NOT modify any files on disk

assertions.name: shows_preview
assertions.check: Prints list of files and patterns that would be changed

evals.expected_output: Handles case-only rename with two-step mv via temp name

assertions.name: detects_case_only
assertions.check: Detects case-only rename and skips local existence check

assertions.name: two_step_rename
assertions.check: Uses mv old temp && mv temp new for case-insensitive FS

evals.prompt: rename stark-review to stark-skills (with uncommitted changes)
evals.expected_output: Refuses to run with clear error message

assertions.name: refuses_dirty
assertions.check: Detects uncommitted changes and aborts before any mutation

assertions.name: clear_error
assertions.check: Tells user to commit or stash first

evals.prompt: rename stark-review to stark-skills (resume after partial failure)
evals.expected_output: Detects partially-completed rename and resumes from correct step

assertions.name: detects_partial
assertions.check: Checks remote URL and local dir name to find resume point

assertions.name: skips_completed_steps
assertions.check: Does not re-run GitHub rename if already done

evals.prompt: rename stark-review to scripts (name already taken on GitHub by different repo)
evals.expected_output: Refuses to rename with clear error about name collision

assertions.name: checks_collision
assertions.check: Compares repo IDs to detect different repo with same name

assertions.name: aborts_before_mutation
assertions.check: Does not call PATCH or modify any files

evals.prompt: rename stark-review to stark-skills (GitHub App lacks admin permission)
evals.expected_output: Fails with clear error about missing admin permission

assertions.name: checks_permission
assertions.check: Calls GET /repos/{org}/{name} and checks permissions.admin

assertions.name: fails_early
assertions.check: Aborts in validation phase, before any mutation
